top_signals.title: US Says It Conducted Fresh Round of Strikes Against Iran
top_signals.summary: The US releases videos from unidentified locations, saying its forces completed a third round of strikes against Iran. It prompted retaliatory strikes from Tehran. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Expert’s hundreds of warnings foretold Venezuelan quake disaster
top_signals.summary: Carlos Genatios spent years warning that flawed reconstruction after the 1999 La Guaira mudslides, combined with continued building in high-risk areas, left the region vulnerable.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Is the AI Bubble About to Burst?
top_signals.summary: Artificial Intelligence has grown in popularity over the past five years, from something consumers only knew from sci-fi movies to a widely used technology. Many companies are now using AI in some form, and it has become part of everyday life for many consumers, with AI services integrated into internet search engines, phone applications, and other daily interactions. However, as AI is deployed at a faster pace, it is becoming clear that the technology cannot be used as extensively as tech companies had hoped, while companies are realising the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
